session_summary: Phase 26 (commit navigation) fully executed and verified. All 3 plans complete, 449 tests passing. User approved all 7 smoke-test checks. Phase marked complete in ROADMAP/STATE/REQUIREMENTS.

pending_work.description: Code review (26-REVIEW.md) found 2 blockers and 5 warnings that need fixing before or during phase 27.

items.description: SHA interpolated directly into fetch URL without hex validation. A malformed server response could redirect to unintended endpoint (e.g. ../branch).
items.fix: Validate SHA with /^[0-9a-f]{7,40}$/i before building the /api/diff/commit/{sha} URL.

items.description: checkedCommitShas seeding effect re-seeds all commits whenever the user unchecks every item (guard is `length === 0`), silently overriding user intent. eslint-disable hides missing dep.
items.fix: Replace the length===0 guard with a seededRef boolean sentinel that only fires once on initial commits load.

items.description: findIndex result used without -1 guard in keyboard handler. If sha is not found, commits[-1] is undefined.
fetchFilteredBranchDiff swallows all per-SHA errors — returns error:null even when every fetch fails, so user sees empty state instead of error/retry UI.
items.fix: Collect per-SHA errors from Promise.allSettled, surface as error string when all fail.

items.description: CommitRow <li> items have onClick but no role=button, tabIndex, or onKeyDown — keyboard/screen-reader users cannot interact.
items.fix: Add role='button', tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown={e => e.key==='Enter' && onCommitClick(sha)}.

items.description: No fallback when activeCommitSha doesn't match any loaded commit — title strip silently omits, no diagnostic.
items.fix: Show fallback string (e.g. short_sha only) when commit lookup returns undefined.

how_to_start_next_session: Run `/gsd:progress` to see updated roadmap. The code review findings above should be fixed — either inline before phase 27 planning, or as a gap-closure phase. Then proceed with `/gsd:discuss-phase 27` or `/gsd:plan-phase 27` for inline comments.
key_decisions_this_session: CommitDrawer moved from inside <aside> to outer flex container (position:relative) — necessary because position:absolute inside overflow:auto gets CSS-clipped to the container boundary.
checkedCommitShas seeding uses length===0 guard (CR-02 flags this as a bug — seededRef is the correct fix).
No new backend routes in phase 26 — all diff/commit endpoints from phase 24 reused as planned.
